page.title: Template:Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]]
}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country

|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Awards%2C_decorations%2C_and_medals_of_Wikipedia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Awards%2C_decorations%2C_and_medals_of_Wikipedia for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox |name = Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |title = :[[File:Wikipedia-logo-v2.svg|20px]] [[Wikipedia:Awards|Awards, decorations, and medals of Wikipedia]] |bodyclass = hlist |listclass = hlist |image = |above =
|group1 = Awarded by co-founder [[:en:Jimmy Wales|Jimmy Wales]] |list1 = * [[File:Jimbo medal3.png|20px|link=Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays]] [[Wikipedia:Wikipedia holidays|Order of the Day]] * [[File:Wikimania logo with text.svg|20px|link=Wikimedian of the Year]] [[:en:Wikimedian of the Year|Wikimedian of the Year]] ** also by country
|group2 = [[Wikipedia:Awards by WikiProject|Awards by WikiProject]] |list2 = * [[File:Trophy.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:WikiCup]] [[Wikipedia:WikiCup|WikiCup]] * [[File:Editor of the week barnstar.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Editor Retention/Editor of the Week|Editor of the Week]] * [[File:Golden W Award2.png|14px|link=Wikipedia:W Awards]] [[Wikipedia:W Awards|W Award]] * [[File:Four Award.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Four Award]] [[Wikipedia:Four Award|Four Award]] * [[File:Crown of Savoy.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Triple Crown]] [[Wikipedia:Triple Crown|Triple Crown]] * [[File:Million award logo.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Million Award]] [[Wikipedia:Million Award|Million Award]] * [[File:Cherry crashing into primordial Earth2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Impact|Impact]] • [[File:Yogo2783 Close crop.JPG|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Quality Article Improvement/Precious|Precious]] |group3 = Barnstars and other personal awards |list3 = * [[File:Original Barnstar Hires.svg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars]] [[Wikipedia:Barnstars|Barnstar awards]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Topical|by topic]] * [[File:Choco chip cookie.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:Personal user awards]] [[Wikipedia:Personal user awards|Personal user awards]] * [[File:Balloons-aj.svg|18px|link=Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers]] [[Wikipedia:Personal greetings and cheers|Personal greetings and cheers]] * {{pad|2px}}[[File:BoNM - United Nations Hires.png|11px|link=Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit]]{{pad|2px}} [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit|Awards by country]] ** [[Wikipedia:Barnstars/Barnstar of National Merit 2.0|2.0]] * [[File:Original Ribbon.png|40px]] [[Wikipedia:Ribbons|Ribbons]]
|group4 = Awards by number of edits |list4 = * [[File:Editorrib23.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Service awards|Service awards]] * [[File:Editorrib05-4.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)]] [[Wikipedia:Incremental service awards (Ribbons)|Incremental service awards]] * [[File:Adminrib20.svg|40px|link=Wikipedia:Administrative service awards]] [[Wikipedia:Administrative service awards|Administrative service awards]]
|group5 = See also |list5 = * [[File:Wikilove2.png|22px|link=Wikipedia:WikiLove]] [[Wikipedia:WikiLove|WikiLove]] * [[File:Echo thanks.svg|22px|link=Help:Notifications/Thanks]] [[Help:Notifications/Thanks|Thanks!]] * [[Wikipedia:Reward board|Reward board]] * [[Wikipedia:Contests|Contests]] * [[File:GlobePolo.jpeg|20px|link=Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways]] [[Wikipedia:Merchandise giveaways|Merchandise giveaways]]
| below = * [[File:BronzepzpcbgA.png|22px]] [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Wikipedia Awards|WikiProject Wikipedia Awards]] * [[File:Peace dove.svg|22px|Peace dove]] [[Wikipedia:Kindness Campaign|Kindness Campaign]] }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
